description: Comprehensive analysis of loss control and transfer techniques (including insurance), risk management concepts, loss adjustment and underwriting problems, and profitability/regulatory issues concerning the insurance industry. Current topics: large-scale catastrophes (hurricanes and earthquakes), solvency, insurance coverages for property exposures, and loss control.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: R M I 300orURB R PL/​A A E/​ECON/​REAL EST  306
